name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 11/14
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For
body:
Monday, November 16, 2015

Last week Senator Rand Paul had a decisive GOP debate victory,
that even the main stream media had to cover. The liberal New
York Times even had to admit, "Rand Paul...had perhaps the best
night of his campaign." The campaign has put together a November
MoneyBomb to keep up the debate victory momentum. Please chip-in
anything you can by donating here.

In other news, Rand officially filed to be placed on the ballot
in New Hampshire. Rand has the strongest ground team of any
campaign in New Hampshire, along with a over 350 member large
leadership team. Stay tuned for more updates next week!

Chip Englander

Campaign Manager

Rand Paul for President

News of the Week

A Conservative Realist
Awakening? Rand Paul Strikes Back

Economics was the subject
of last night's Republican debate in Milwaukee, hosted by the Fox
Business Channel and Wall Street Journal. But foreign policy
stole the show-specifically, Rand Paul's brand of conservative
realism, which the Kentucky senator unsparingly deployed against
Marco Rubio and Jeb Bush. Paul questioned how Rubio could claim
to be a conservative when he was for lavish government spending
on defense. "I know that Rand is a committed isolationist," an
irritated Rubio shot back.

Rand Paul Shuts Down Donald
Trump, Moderators, and Commercial Breaks

This is how you do it. A
little more than an hour into Tuesday night's G.O.P. presidential
primary debate, most of the Republican hopefuls were ready for a
commercial break. Most of the moderators were, too. So were the
majority of viewers, and certainly, the advertisers who paid a
pretty penny for their spots to air. But Rand Paul and debate
moderator and Wall Street Journal editor Gerard Baker had another
idea.

In Latest Debate, Of Course
It Was Rand Paul

It was Rand Paul who asked
the most important question at this week's Republican
presidential debate. What is a fiscal conservative?
Naturally, since Paul was the one asking, it was largely ignored
by the drones of conventional wisdom and by the other candidates.
But the campaign is about to move into that odd phase where
Americans actually, formally, begin to express their preferences
in states like New Hampshire and Iowa.

Featured Video

Rand Paul Supporter Endorsement Video

Want to be in our next endorsement video? Click
here to tell us why you stand with Rand!

Photos from the Week

Featured Event

George Washington
University Students for Rand Rally

Join Senator Rand Paul at
the "George Washington University Students for Rand Rally!" At
the SFR Rally Senator Paul will talk policy, take pictures, and
show the Washington establishment that the youth vote DOES
matter!

Volunteer of the Week

Ben Galeazzi

Nevada

Ben is the co-chairman of
Marion County for Rand Paul. He also helps his dad run his
hunting business and is an advocate for home schooling. He also
spends a great deal of his time on humanitarian trips. Ben
beleives that Rand Paul is the only fiscal conservative in the
race which is why he has been so involved in the campaign.

Featured Store Product

$5 Off Top Selling Tee
Shirts

Reduced Prices!

Order your Rand
Paul Tee shirts! The top 5 selling tee shirts are $5 off!
Celebrate the debate victory and order now!

Quote of the Week

Post this to your Instagram

On your phone, tap and hold, click Save
Image, then post to your Instagram with hashtag #StandwithRand

Tweet of the Week

Retweet and follow @RandPaul on
Twitter!

Paid For By Rand Paul For
President

name: Ben Carson
subject: Add your name: No Syrian refugees in the U.S.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31669163:WqHKlAy9N:m:1:876315805:EB9AC4BBC6BC7217ACE4824E05E3B25B:r)
---

Peter,

President Obama's plan to bring 10,000 Syrian refugees into the United States is a bad idea, and Hillary Clinton's plan to increase that number to 65,000 is even worse.

**[I've just launched a national petition to stop it, and I ask you to sign it right now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31669163:WqHKlAy9N:m:1:876315805:EB9AC4BBC6BC7217ACE4824E05E3B25B:r)

**In addition, I've sent a letter to Speaker Paul Ryan calling on the U.S. House of Representatives to terminate all public funding for any ongoing federal programs that seek to resettle refugees and/or migrants from Syria into the United States, effective immediately.

**It would require a suspension of our intellect to think that ISIS will not work to infiltrate terrorists into the United States disguised as refugees or migrants.

**I fully understand that many of these refugees are themselves fleeing terror, which is why America and its allies can and should help them to re-settle somewhere else in the region.

But in light of the horrific attacks in Paris and the unambiguous threats from ISIS to bring the same bloodshed to our shores, President Obama's plan simply must not move forward. The safety of the American people should be the number one priority.

[**Together, we've built a movement of millions of Americans. It's time to band together to stop this dangerous policy from moving forward. Please sign and share this petition now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31669163:WqHKlAy9N:m:1:876315805:EB9AC4BBC6BC7217ACE4824E05E3B25B:r)

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31669164:WqHKlAy9N:m:1:876315805:EB9AC4BBC6BC7217ACE4824E05E3B25B:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31669165:WqHKlAy9N:m:1:876315805:EB9AC4BBC6BC7217ACE4824E05E3B25B:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: No Refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
, The first priority of the Commander in Chief is to make our country safe. It is my top priority and I will continue to fight to make sure that as Ronald Reagan said, we have "peace through strength". **The biggest national security risk facing our country today is being perpetrated by both Republicans and Democrats in Washington who have been cutting deals to make our borders less secure and allow the bad guys access to our country.** The terrorists in Paris utilized the refugee crisis as a means to penetrate European borders and ultimately commit acts of terror. ** ** One of the lessons we should learn from the tragedy is that we have to be very careful and very cautious, extraordinarily cautious, about our immigration policies. [Will you stand with me today and sign the petition to express your support for my opposition to the dangerous refugees being allowed into our country?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31672915:szDmiAyNt:m:1:879035888:DC6402FFC050A4CD0A9901D8E7DFC55B:r) I have always felt that liberal immigration policies and insecure borders put our country at very serious security risk. That is why I previously put forth the "Trust but Verify" amendment to Senator Rubio's "Gang of 8" immigration bill. The policy I proposed would have increased the scrutiny of people coming into the country -- it is the type of legislation that we need to protect this country from people who seek to do us harm on our soil. Unfortunately, Senator Rubio teamed up with liberal Senator Chuck Schumer to block all conservative amendments because they cut a deal on amnesty. It was a huge mistake - not only for the bill - but also for our national security. **Simply put, Senator Rubio 's actions on amnesty should disqualify him from earning the support of conservatives within our party. ** How can we trust him to stand for conservative principles if he sells out on amnesty to liberals in Congress? How can we trust him on national security if he recently pushed for the refugees who caused the Paris tragedy to come to America? The answer is we can't trust Marco Rubio to stand up for conservative principles and we can't trust him on immigration. The problem is, interventionists like Rubio have never met a war they didn't want our sons and daughters to fight. He wants our children to fight on the frontlines in the Middle East, but is unwilling to do what it takes to protect our country here at home from bad people who want to use liberal immigration policies to penetrate our borders. You and I both know, we can't fix the refugee crisis by blocking all conservative amendments and throwing money into foreign countries. Rubio has it all wrong and we know exactly what it will get us; dangerous wars, more debt, porous borders, and less safety here at home. **I will continue to stand for policies that make us more safe and oppose insider deals that sell out conservative principles.** [Will you stand with me?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31672915:szDmiAyNt:m:1:879035888:DC6402FFC050A4CD0A9901D8E7DFC55B:r) In liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Rand Paul
subject: New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
You could feel the energy in the air on Friday. After many months of crisscrossing New Hampshire and fighting hard for every vote, I was joined by hundreds of their residents and dozens of their state's elected officials as I signed up to be on the First in the Nation Primary ballot in New Hampshire. Please check out the video below to hear my statements following the filing: [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31676353:WoDhJAyoN:m:1:879035888:8043DA895CE507C07DAD51F48C3B307B:r)
> We can't borrow our way to prosperity, we can't borrow our way to strength. I see an America that is prosperous. I see an America that is rich and free. And I see an America that is the most humanitarian ever in the history of mankind. But if we want to continue that, we need a government so small you can't see it. That's what I'm about. I hope you'll help me. On to victory in New Hampshire! #StandwithRand Posted by [Rand Paul](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31676354:WoDhJAyoN:m:1:879035888:8043DA895CE507C07DAD51F48C3B307B:r) on Friday, 13 November 2015
Our work is more important than ever. [Please help us get closer to victory by joining our debate moneybomb today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31676355:WoDhJAyoN:m:1:879035888:8043DA895CE507C07DAD51F48C3B307B:r) In liberty, Rand Paul | | [$10 Money Bomb >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31676356:WoDhJAyoN:m:1:879035888:8043DA895CE507C07DAD51F48C3B307B:r)
---

clean_body: You could feel the energy in the air on Friday. After many months of crisscrossing New Hampshire and fighting hard for every vote, I was joined by hundreds of their residents and dozens of their state's elected officials as I signed up to be on the First in the Nation Primary ballot in New Hampshire. Please check out the video below to hear my statements following the filing: We can't borrow our way to prosperity, we can't borrow our way to strength. I see an America that is prosperous. I see an America that is rich and free. And I see an America that is the most humanitarian ever in the history of mankind. But if we want to continue that, we need a government so small you can't see it. That's what I'm about. I hope you'll help me. On to victory in New Hampshire! #StandwithRand Posted by on Friday, 13 November 2015 Our work is more important than ever. In liberty, Rand Paul | | Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. name: Lauren Fritts
subject: Did you watch the President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932337:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r) |
| | | Peter, The President's remarks this morning only further stress the point Governor Christie made over the weekend about the dire need for strong leadership in this country. Instead of his typical, off the cuff remarks, the Governor's "fiery" speech addressed this Administration's massive foreign policy failures and the fact that "the world is desperate for a strong, secure, smart and tested American president."
If you didn't see this video from Saturday, **[watch here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932337:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)**. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932337:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)
> **[Christie: It's Time To Have A President Who Sees The World As It Really Is, Not How He Wishes It Would Be](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932337:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)**
> _"Just think of the things that this president had said in the past few years. He claimed that our borders were more secure than they've ever been. He claimed that after Qaddafi and Mubarak were gone, the Middle East would be safer than it's ever been. He told us al Qaeda was on the run. He called ISIS the J.V. And just hours, just hours yesterday, before they struck in Paris, he told "ABC news" that his strategy was containing ISIS. All of these statements were a lie. He sees the world as he likes to see it, as fantasy. I see the world as it really is and it's time to have a president who sees the world as it really is, not how he wishes it would be."_ _"Ladies and gentlemen, every candidate for president, every time they run likes to say that this is the most important election in our lifetime. The reason, of course, we say it, is because it's the most important election to us in our lifetime because we're running. But let me tell you this. We cannot afford to elect another president who sees America as Barack Obama sees America. We cannot afford to elect another president without the requisite experience and values to effectively govern. This is not a job for on the job training, everybody. We need someone who's made decisions, who stuck by those decisions and who understands the ramifications not only of action, but of inaction. America is a country of action. It has become a country of reactive inaction. And when I'm president of the United States, America will be a nation of action again and action in the interest of one goal - protecting the safety, security, and freedom of the American people."_
**** What do you think? Let us know your thoughts and help us share the video on **[Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932338:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)** and **[Twitter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932339:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)** today! Lauren
Digital Director
Chris Christie for President

---

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932340:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932341:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44932343:6PpL77LNc:m:1:1516426255:2E48C9F7E7E6823CE6A949EB4B28D813:r)

name: Team Katie
subject: NYT calls out Pat Toomey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**Tell Pat Toomey: Stop the partisan obstructionism and political games!**
[**Add your name today >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-581063204898078720/-5364329215430754304?ms=20151116&refcode=e20151116&amount=15)

Friend --

Republican Senator Pat Toomey's obstructionism in Congress has reached a whole new level -- he's now blocking _his own judicial nominees_.

In November 2014, Pat Toomey recommended Judge Luis Felipe Restrepo of the U.S. District Court in Philadelphia to serve a prestigious and necessary position on the federal Court of Appeals. Now it's a year later, and the U.S. Senate has still not confirmed him. Why? **According to the _New York Times_ Editorial Board, Pat Toomey is "responsible for a big part of it, refusing for six months to sign off on the nomination by exploiting a pointless tradition."**

When Republicans like Pat Toomey are willing to hold up their own judicial nominees, it's crystal clear that they are more interested in partisan obstructionism and political games than in making our system work.

[**Enough is enough. Sign your name to demand that Pat Toomey stop obstructing our judicial system and confirm Judge Restrepo and President Obama 's other nominees.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-581063204898078720/-5364329215430754304?ms=20151116&refcode=e20151116&amount=15)

| **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-581063204898078720/-5364329215430754304?ms=20151116&refcode=e20151116&amount=15)**
---

Republican Pat Toomey previously called Judge Restrepo "a very well-qualified candidate" who would "make a superb addition" to the Court. Yet he and his Republican friends in the Senate are refusing to bring Judge Restrepo and dozens more judicial nominees to a floor vote. In fact, since taking over the Senate in January, Republican obstructionism has led to judicial nominees being confirmed at the slowest pace in more than fifty years.

This refusal to fulfill the basic duties of a Senator has created a "judicial emergency," meaning there are now dozens of federal judgeships that remain vacant, allowing hundreds of critical cases to be backlogged in our judicial system.

**It 's time for Pat Toomey and his Republican friends to put their right-wing agenda aside and stop the obstructionism.**

[**Add your name to demand Pat Toomey confirm President Obama 's judicial nominees and get our courts working again >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-581063204898078720/-5364329215430754304?ms=20151116&refcode=e20151116&amount=15)

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-581063204898078720/-5292271621392826368?refcode=e20151116&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-581063204898078720/-3923177334672195584).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: This is not a moment. It's a movement.
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Saturday's debate showed that we can win, but standing on a debate stage for two hours does not win an election.
Debating our opponents gets our issues in front of new voters. Then it's up to our campaign to contact those voters, bring them into our movement, and turn them out to vote.
I want to be very clear about something though: **You are our movement.** We don't have any billionaires waiting in the wings with bags of cash, no saviors from the oligarchy ready to swoop in and save the day. **It's you.**
**There's no one else except for ordinary Americans who are tired of the influence of the billionaire class.** Now, there's a lot of us -- but we need to come together, get organized, and win.
[**So I need to ask you: can you step up and contribute $3 to our campaign?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c99/1458511258/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join-our-movement?refcode=em151116full")
Our opponents have been running TV ads since early summer. They're funding their campaigns with checks from billionaires and Wall Street. **We always knew we would be outspent, but we can make sure we're not out-organized.**
What we are offering is a chance for Americans to not just get involved in the political process, but to take it back from the billionaire class. Our grassroots movement is organizing, communicating, and connecting in communities across the country.
Together, we can dismantle this corrupt political system -- one phone call, one flyer, one conversation at a time. This kind of real organizing work is being done at a scale not seen elsewhere in this election. Tens of thousands of people turned out over the last week and made an incredible number of calls to voters in early states, helping identify who will come to the polls for Bernie. It's thanks to folks like these:
> _" I phonebanked for an hour then taught another person how to phone bank, and we made plans to start meeting regularly. It felt great to say, 'I'm a volunteer for Bernie Sanders.'"_ \- Sylvia from CO
> _" The people who signed up actually came, and completely filled up my small living room. It was cozy! Lots of discussion and diverse ages! After explaining why the campaign is asking for people to phone bank in the early primary states, I was very surprised at how many people volunteered to phone bank! People also wanted to attend more events, canvass, and use their special skills for the campaign. I encouraged them to apply online, and I will follow up with them. Most of them expressed a desire to develop an ongoing local group to promote Bernie's campaign."_ \- Catherine from NJ
> _" I fed everyone dinner and then, we had a quick training on the Virtual Phone Bank. Afterwards, four people started making calls. It was decided this event was so much fun, that one of our newbies decided to hold an event at her house on Monday - just three days later!! - to repeat the dinner and phone banking event! Everyone agreed to come to her event - even our guest that traveled almost 2 hours to get here!"_ \- Robin from TX
> _" We had a very pleasant experience with our first phonebanking event. Six people signed up and three showed, all with very positive attitudes and willing to work. The first hour was spent with introductions (we were all new to each other) and an orientation for the process. After that we all just called for about an hour and a half! It was a productive event and I can see how if thousands of volunteers around the country do this work we WILL make a difference in the early states."_ \- Fernando from CA
This is who will help us win. Folks like Sylvia, Catherine, Robin, Fernando, and thousands of others who want to take back our corrupt political system.
The only way we can win -- countering the influence of Wall Street, health insurance companies, and the rest of America's oligarchy -- is if enough people come together to join our movement.
**So, are you in?**
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign to show the billionaire class that ENOUGH is ENOUGH. Help us win this.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c99/1458511258/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join-our-movement?refcode=em151116full")
Thank you, deeply, for everything you do.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c99/1458511258/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join-our-movement?refcode=em151116full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c86/1458511258/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c87/1458511258/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c84/1458511258/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2785/43f17890/50dc00da/621e5c85/1458511258/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
